description: Read-only-by-default MCP server for iCloud mail, calendar, and contacts (IMAP/CalDAV/CardDAV).
name: io.github.eodozzy/icloud-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Your Apple ID email (the IMAP/CalDAV username).
environmentVariables.name: ICLOUD_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: OS-keyring service name to read the app-specific password from. Default: icloud-mcp. Set to reuse an existing entry.
environmentVariables.name: ICLOUD_KEYRING_SERVICE

environmentVariables.description: App-specific password. Fallback only; preferred storage is the OS keyring. Used only when no keyring entry is found.
environmentVariables.name: ICLOUD_APP_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Enable mutating tools (send/reply/forward mail, create/update/delete event & contact). Off by default; each write still requires interactive confirmation. Accepts 1/true/yes/on.
environmentVariables.name: ICLOUD_ENABLE_WRITES

environmentVariables.description: SMTP host override (used only by write/send tools). Default: smtp.mail.me.com
environmentVariables.name: ICLOUD_SMTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: CalDAV base URL override. Default: https://caldav.icloud.com/
environmentVariables.name: ICLOUD_CALDAV_URL

environmentVariables.description: CardDAV base URL override. Default: https://contacts.icloud.com/
environmentVariables.name: ICLOUD_CARDDAV_URL

environmentVariables.description: IANA timezone for rendering/scoping events. Default: system local time.
environmentVariables.name: ICLOUD_TZ
